latestShow.title: 2nd Jewish Anti-Zionist Congress takes place in Dublin – Ronnie Barkan details wartime secret treaties between SS ‘Final Solution’ officer Adolf Eichmann and US based Zionists – Ex Tory minster & Reform UK home affairs brief Ann Widdecombe murdered day after Farage forces by election over threats to his life and family – Craig Murray: UK National Security (State Threats) Act spells jail for those using information from Russia or Iran
